req.title: Create medication request (negative)
req.statement: A prescribing clinician shall issue a MedicationRequest; requests for controlled substances shall require schedule verification. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest test suite for MedicationRequest prescribing requirements.

Requirement: A prescribing clinician shall issue a MedicationRequest;
requests for controlled substances shall require schedule verification.
Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements,
and conflicting state transitions must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, PropertyMock
from enum import Enum
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model stubs (replace with real imports in production)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ControlledSubstanceSchedule(str, Enum):
    SCHEDULE_I   = "Schedule I"
    SCHEDULE_II  = "Schedule II"
    SCHEDULE_III = "Schedule III"
    SCHEDULE_IV  = "Schedule IV"
    SCHEDULE_V   = "Schedule V"
    NOT_CONTROLLED = "Not Controlled"


class MedicationRequestStatus(str, Enum):
    DRAFT      = "draft"
    ACTIVE     = "active"
    ON_HOLD    = "on-hold"
    CANCELLED  = "cancelled"
    COMPLETED  = "completed"
    ENTERED_IN_ERROR = "entered-in-error"


class ClinicalRole(str, Enum):
    PHYSICIAN       = "physician"
    NURSE           = "nurse"
    PHARMACIST      = "pharmacist"
    ADMIN           = "admin"
    NURSE_PRACTITIONER = "nurse_practitioner"
    PA              = "physician_assistant"


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    clinician_id: str
    name: str
    role: ClinicalRole
    dea_number: Optional[str] = None          # Required for Schedule II–V
    state_license: Optional[str] = None
    active: bool = True
    has_prescribing_privilege: bool = True


@dataclass
class Medication:
    medication_id: str
    name: str
    schedule: ControlledSubstanceSchedule = ControlledSubstanceSchedule.NOT_CONTROLLED
    ndc: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Patient:
    patient_id: str
    name: str
    date_of_birth: str
    active: bool = True


@dataclass
class MedicationRequest:
    medication:  Medication
    patient:     Patient
    prescriber:  Clinician
    dose:        Optional[str] = None
    frequency:   Optional[str] = None
    quantity:    Optional[int] = None
    refills:     int = 0
    status:      MedicationRequestStatus = MedicationRequestStatus.DRAFT
    reason:      Optional[str] = None
    issued_at:   Optional[datetime] = None
    request_id:  Optional[str] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Application service stub
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class PermissionDeniedError(Exception):
    pass

class MissingMandatoryElementError(Exception):
    pass

class ScheduleVerificationError(Exception):
    pass

class InvalidStateTransitionError(Exception):
    pass

class ScheduleINotPrescribableError(Exception):
    pass


class MedicationRequestService:
    """Thin service layer – swap for real implementation."""

    VALID_TRANSITIONS: dict[MedicationRequestStatus, list[MedicationRequestStatus]] = {
        MedicationRequestStatus.DRAFT:      [MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE,
                                             MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED],
        MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE:     [MedicationRequestStatus.ON_HOLD,
                                             MedicationRequestStatus.COMPLETED,
                                             MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED],
        MedicationRequestStatus.ON_HOLD:    [MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE,
                                             MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED],
        MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED:  [],
        MedicationRequestStatus.COMPLETED:  [],
        MedicationRequestStatus.ENTERED_IN_ERROR: [],
    }

    def issue(self, request: MedicationRequest) -> MedicationRequest:
        self._check_prescriber_permission(request.prescriber)
        self._validate_mandatory_elements(request)
        self._check_schedule_verification(request)
        request.status    = MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE
        request.issued_at = datetime.utcnow()
        request.request_id = f"RX-{request.patient.patient_id}-{int(datetime.utcnow().timestamp())}"
        return request

    def transition(
        self,
        request: MedicationRequest,
        new_status: MedicationRequestStatus,
        actor: Clinician,
    ) -> MedicationRequest:
        self._check_prescriber_permission(actor)
        allowed = self.VALID_TRANSITIONS.get(request.status, [])
        if new_status not in allowed:
            raise InvalidStateTransitionError(
                f"Cannot transition from {request.status} to {new_status}"
            )
        request.status = new_status
        return request

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Private helpers
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    def _check_prescriber_permission(self, clinician: Clinician) -> None:
        if not clinician.active:
            raise PermissionDeniedError(f"Clinician {clinician.clinician_id} is inactive.")
        if not clinician.has_prescribing_privilege:
            raise PermissionDeniedError(
                f"Clinician {clinician.clinician_id} does not have prescribing privileges."
            )
        if clinician.role not in (
            ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            ClinicalRole.NURSE_PRACTITIONER,
            ClinicalRole.PA,
        ):
            raise PermissionDeniedError(
                f"Role {clinician.role} is not authorised to prescribe."
            )

    def _validate_mandatory_elements(self, request: MedicationRequest) -> None:
        errors = []
        if not request.medication:
            errors.append("medication")
        if not request.patient:
            errors.append("patient")
        if not request.prescriber:
            errors.append("prescriber")
        if not request.dose:
            errors.append("dose")
        if not request.frequency:
            errors.append("frequency")
        if request.quantity is None or request.quantity <= 0:
            errors.append("quantity")
        if errors:
            raise MissingMandatoryElementError(
                f"Missing or invalid mandatory elements: {', '.join(errors)}"
            )

    def _check_schedule_verification(self, request: MedicationRequest) -> None:
        schedule = request.medication.schedule
        if schedule == ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_I:
            raise ScheduleINotPrescribableError(
                "Schedule I substances cannot be prescribed."
            )
        if schedule != ControlledSubstanceSchedule.NOT_CONTROLLED:
            if not request.prescriber.dea_number:
                raise ScheduleVerificationError(
                    "A valid DEA number is required to prescribe controlled substances."
                )
            if not request.prescriber.state_license:
                raise ScheduleVerificationError(
                    "A valid state license is required to prescribe controlled substances."
                )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def service() -> MedicationRequestService:
    return MedicationRequestService()

        patient_id="PT-100",

@pytest.fixture

        medication_id="MED-001",
        name="Amoxicillin 500mg",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.NOT_CONTROLLED,
        ndc="00093-4155-01",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def schedule_ii_med() -> Medication:
    return Medication(
        medication_id="MED-002",
        name="Oxycodone 5mg",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_II,
        ndc="00406-0512-01",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def schedule_iii_med() -> Medication:
    return Medication(
        medication_id="MED-003",
        name="Buprenorphine 8mg",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_III,
        ndc="12496-1283-01",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def schedule_iv_med() -> Medication:
    return Medication(
        medication_id="MED-004",
        name="Alprazolam 0.5mg",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_IV,
        ndc="00009-0029-01",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def schedule_v_med() -> Medication:
    return Medication(
        medication_id="MED-005",
        name="Pregabalin 75mg",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_V,
        ndc="00071-1013-68",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def schedule_i_med() -> Medication:
    return Medication(
        medication_id="MED-006",
        name="Heroin",
        schedule=ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_I,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def valid_nc_request(physician, patient, non_controlled_med) -> MedicationRequest:
    return MedicationRequest(
        medication=non_controlled_med,
        patient=patient,
        prescriber=physician,
        dose="500mg",
        frequency="TID",

    )

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Happy-path tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestIssueMedicationRequestHappyPath:

    def test_physician_can_issue_non_controlled_medication(
        self, service, valid_nc_request
    ):
        result = service.issue(valid_nc_request)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE

    def test_issued_request_receives_request_id(
        self, service, valid_nc_request
    ):
        result = service.issue(valid_nc_request)
        assert result.request_id is not None
        assert result.request_id.startswith("RX-")

    def test_issued_request_records_timestamp(
        self, service, valid_nc_request
    ):
        before = datetime.utcnow()
        result = service.issue(valid_nc_request)
        after  = datetime.utcnow()
        assert before <= result.issued_at <= after

    def test_physician_with_dea_can_issue_schedule_ii(
        self, service, valid_schedule_ii_request
    ):
        result = service.issue(valid_schedule_ii_request)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE

    def test_np_can_issue_schedule_iii_with_dea(
        self, service, np_clinician, patient, schedule_iii_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_iii_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=np_clinician,
            dose="8mg",
            frequency="BID",
            quantity=30,
        )
        result = service.issue(req)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE

    def test_physician_can_issue_schedule_iv_medication(
        self, service, physician, patient, schedule_iv_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_iv_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="0.5mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=90,
        )
        result = service.issue(req)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE

    def test_physician_can_issue_schedule_v_medication(
        self, service, physician, patient, schedule_v_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_v_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="75mg",
            frequency="BID",
            quantity=60,
        )
        result = service.issue(req)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE

    def test_pa_can_issue_non_controlled_medication(
        self, service, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        pa = Clinician(
            clinician_id="PA-001",
            name="PA Frank",
            role=ClinicalRole.PA,
            dea_number="FP1234561",
            state_license="NY-PA-55555",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=pa,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="BID",
            quantity=14,
        )
        result = service.issue(req)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Permission-denial negative tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestPermissionDenial:

    def test_nurse_cannot_prescribe(
        self, service, nurse, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=nurse,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError, match="not authorised to prescribe"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_pharmacist_cannot_prescribe(
        self, service, pharmacist, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=pharmacist,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_admin_cannot_prescribe(
        self, service, admin_user, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=admin_user,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_inactive_clinician_cannot_prescribe(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        physician.active = False
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError, match="inactive"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_clinician_without_prescribing_privilege_is_denied(
        self, service, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-002",
            name="Dr. Suspended",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=False,   # privilege revoked
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError, match="prescribing privileges"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_inactive_clinician_with_dea_still_denied(
        self, service, patient, schedule_ii_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-003",
            name="Dr. Retired",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number="RT1234563",
            state_license="NY-MD-11111",
            active=False,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_ii_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="5mg",
            frequency="Q6H PRN",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(PermissionDeniedError):
            service.issue(req)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Missing mandatory elements negative tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestMissingMandatoryElements:

    def test_missing_dose_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose=None,               # intentionally omitted
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="dose"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_missing_frequency_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency=None,
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="frequency"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_missing_quantity_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="quantity"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_zero_quantity_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=0,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="quantity"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_negative_quantity_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=-5,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="quantity"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_missing_multiple_elements_reports_all(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose=None,
            frequency=None,
            quantity=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError) as exc_info:
            service.issue(req)
        error_msg = str(exc_info.value)
        assert "dose"      in error_msg
        assert "frequency" in error_msg
        assert "quantity"  in error_msg

    def test_empty_string_dose_raises_error(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingMandatoryElementError, match="dose"):
            service.issue(req)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Schedule verification negative tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestScheduleVerification:

    def test_schedule_ii_requires_dea_number(
        self, service, patient, schedule_ii_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-010",
            name="Dr. No DEA",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,              # no DEA
            state_license="NY-MD-22222",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_ii_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="5mg",
            frequency="Q6H PRN",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError, match="DEA number"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_schedule_iii_requires_dea_number(
        self, service, patient, schedule_iii_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-011",
            name="Dr. No DEA",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,
            state_license="NY-MD-33333",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_iii_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="8mg",
            frequency="BID",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError, match="DEA number"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_schedule_iv_requires_dea_number(
        self, service, patient, schedule_iv_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-012",
            name="Dr. No DEA",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,
            state_license="NY-MD-44444",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_iv_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="0.5mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=90,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_schedule_v_requires_dea_number(
        self, service, patient, schedule_v_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-013",
            name="Dr. No DEA",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,
            state_license="NY-MD-55555",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_v_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="75mg",
            frequency="BID",
            quantity=60,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_controlled_substance_requires_state_license(
        self, service, patient, schedule_ii_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-014",
            name="Dr. No License",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number="NL1234563",
            state_license=None,           # missing state license
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_ii_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="5mg",
            frequency="Q6H PRN",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError, match="state license"):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_schedule_i_is_never_prescribable(
        self, service, physician, patient, schedule_i_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_i_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="10mg",
            frequency="QD",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleINotPrescribableError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_schedule_i_not_prescribable_even_with_full_credentials(
        self, service, physician, patient, schedule_i_med
    ):
        """Even a fully credentialed physician must not prescribe Schedule I."""
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=schedule_i_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="1mg",
            frequency="QD",
            quantity=10,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleINotPrescribableError):
            service.issue(req)

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("schedule", [
        ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_II,
        ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_III,
        ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_IV,
        ControlledSubstanceSchedule.SCHEDULE_V,
    ])
    def test_all_controlled_schedules_require_dea(
        self, service, patient, schedule
    ):
        med = Medication(
            medication_id="MED-TEST",
            name="Test Controlled Med",
            schedule=schedule,
        )
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-015",
            name="Dr. Parametrized",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,
            state_license="NY-MD-77777",
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="10mg",
            frequency="QD",
            quantity=30,
        )
        with pytest.raises(ScheduleVerificationError):
            service.issue(req)

    def test_non_controlled_does_not_require_dea(
        self, service, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        clinician = Clinician(
            clinician_id="MD-016",
            name="Dr. No DEA Needed",
            role=ClinicalRole.PHYSICIAN,
            dea_number=None,
            state_license=None,
            active=True,
            has_prescribing_privilege=True,
        )
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=clinician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
        )
        # Should NOT raise ScheduleVerificationError
        result = service.issue(req)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# State transition negative tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestStateTransitions:

    def _active_request(self, physician, patient, non_controlled_med):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
            status=MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE,
        )
        return req

    def test_valid_transition_active_to_on_hold(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = self._active_request(physician, patient, non_controlled_med)
        result = service.transition(req, MedicationRequestStatus.ON_HOLD, physician)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.ON_HOLD

    def test_valid_transition_active_to_completed(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = self._active_request(physician, patient, non_controlled_med)
        result = service.transition(req, MedicationRequestStatus.COMPLETED, physician)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.COMPLETED

    def test_valid_transition_active_to_cancelled(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = self._active_request(physician, patient, non_controlled_med)
        result = service.transition(req, MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED, physician)
        assert result.status == MedicationRequestStatus.CANCELLED

    def test_cannot_transition_from_completed_to_active(
        self, service, physician, patient, non_controlled_med
    ):
        req = MedicationRequest(
            medication=non_controlled_med,
            patient=patient,
            prescriber=physician,
            dose="500mg",
            frequency="TID",
            quantity=21,
            status=MedicationRequestStatus.COMPLETED,
        )
        with pytest.raises(InvalidStateTransitionError):
            service.transition(req, MedicationRequestStatus.ACTIVE, physician)

    def test_cannot_transition_from_cancelled_to_active(

and conflicting state transitions must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, PropertyMock
from enum import Enum

from typing import Optional


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model stubs (replace with real imports in production)

class ControlledSubstanceSchedule(str, Enum):
    SCHEDULE_I   = "Schedule I"
    SCHEDULE_II  = "Schedule II"
    SCHEDULE_III = "Schedule III"
    SCHEDULE_IV  = "Schedule IV"
    SCHEDULE_V   = "Schedule V"
    NOT_CONTROLLED = "Not Controlled"


class MedicationRequestStatus(str, Enum):
    DRAFT      = "draft"
    ACTIVE     = "active"
    ON_HOLD    = "on-hold"
    CANCELLED  = "cancelled"
    COMPLETED  = "completed"
    ENTERED_IN_ERROR = "entered-in-error"


class ClinicalRole(str, Enum):
    PHYSICIAN       = "physician"

    ADMIN           = "admin"

    PA              = "physician_assistant"


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    clinician_id: str
    name: str
    role: ClinicalRole
    dea_number: Optional[str] = None          # Required for Schedule II–V
    state_license: Optional[str] = None
    active: bool = True

@dataclass
class Medication:
    medication_id: str
    name: str
    schedule: ControlledSubstanceSchedule = ControlledSubstanceSchedule.NOT_CONTROLLED
    ndc: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Patient:
    patient_id: str
    name: str
    date_of_birth: str
    active: bool = True


@dataclass
class MedicationRequest:
    medication:  Medication
    patient:     Patient
    prescriber:  Clinician
    dose:        Optional[str] = None
    frequency:   Optional[str] = None
    quantity:    Optional[int] = None
    refills:     int = 0
    status:      MedicationRequestStatus = MedicationRequestStatus.DRAFT
    reason:      Optional[str] = None
    issued_at:   Optional[datetime] = None
    request_id:  Optional[str] = None

    pass
